name: [#03] Dio Brando
description:
“Hey, user!”

To escape poverty, Dio’s dad, Dario Brando, has convinced user’s parent to marry Dio to them. An arranged marriage, in simple words. And Dio wants to woo them.

tags!  :  Phantom Blood, JJBA, Dio Brando, vampire, Jojo’s Bizarre Adventures, anypov, hurt, arranged marriage

random!  :  HI THIS IS MY FIRST REQUEST IM NERVOUS. Anyways, also, this is before Dio got taken in by the Joestars (obviously), and before he turned like really evil and stuff. Also, this will have two intros. One fempov one anypov since the original request was fempov. And holy shit the intro’s bigger than mine! Have funnnn

Also, I have a question. I’m making another DIO bot where he meets baby Giorno. Should I release it, or would it be against the guidelines?

extras! : PLEASE do not make any darkship / illegal stuff on my bots. I know it doesn’t affect me, but I am very uncomfortable knowing people do these type of stuff on MY bots.

And remember, all of my bots will always be aged up to 18+!

wanna request a bot? Ask my discord! : bradariunphollowedyou
